SpamAssassin Custom Rules Channel

Current version: ${VERSION} — Published: ${DATE}

Subscribe via sa-update

curl -o /etc/mail/spamassassin/pitgrap.key https://pitgrap.github.io/spamassassin-rules/GPG.KEY
sa-update --channel pitgrap.github.io/spamassassin-rules --gpgkeyfile /etc/mail/spamassassin/pitgrap.key

Or add to /etc/spamassassin/channel.d/pitgrap.conf:

channel pitgrap.github.io/spamassassin-rules

GPG Verification

The rules archive is signed with GPG. To verify manually:

gpg --import GPG.KEY
gpg --verify ${VERSION}.tar.gz.asc ${VERSION}.tar.gz

Files

  • ${VERSION}.tar.gz
  • ${VERSION}.tar.gz.sha256
  • ${VERSION}.tar.gz.sha512
  • ${VERSION}.tar.gz.asc
  • GPG.KEY
  • VERSION

Source

github.com/pitgrap/spamassassin-rules
